question: How can I track my order?
answer: Go to My Orders section and click on track order.

question: Where is my order?
answer: You can check your order status in My Orders section.

question: Track my package
answer: Use the tracking option in My Orders to track your package.

question: Order tracking
answer: Go to My Orders and select track order.

question: How do I cancel my order?
answer: Go to My Orders and click on cancel order.

question: Cancel my order
answer: Open My Orders and choose cancel option.

question: Can I cancel my order?
answer: Yes, you can cancel from My Orders before shipping.

question: What is the return policy?
answer: You can return products within 7 days of delivery.

question: How to return a product?
answer: Go to My Orders and select return product option.

question: Return my order
answer: Select your order and click on return option.

question: Can I return my product?
answer: Yes, return is allowed within 7 days.

question: How long does delivery take?
answer: Delivery usually takes 3 to 5 business days.

question: Delivery time
answer: Orders are delivered within 3 to 5 days.

question: When will I receive my order?
answer: You will receive your order within 3 to 5 days.

question: What payment methods are available?
answer: We accept UPI, debit card, credit card and cash on delivery.

question: Payment options
answer: UPI, cards and cash on delivery are available.

question: Can I pay by cash?
answer: Yes, cash on delivery is available.

question: Is online payment available?
answer: Yes, you can pay using UPI, cards or net banking.

question: How to contact customer support?
answer: You can contact us via email or helpline number.

question: Customer care number
answer: Call our helpline for support.

question: Support contact
answer: Reach us through email or phone support.

question: How to change delivery address?
answer: You can change address before order is shipped.

question: Edit my address
answer: Go to settings and update your address.

question: Do you provide refund?
answer: Yes, refunds are processed within 5 to 7 days.

question: When will I get refund?
answer: Refund will be credited within 5 to 7 business days.

question: How to login?
answer: Click on login and enter your email and password.

question: I forgot my password
answer: Click on forgot password and reset it.

question: Do you offer free delivery?
answer: Free delivery is available on selected orders.

question: Shipping charges
answer: Shipping charges depend on order value and location.

question: How to place an order?
answer: Select product, add to cart and proceed to checkout.

question: Order process
answer: Add items to cart and complete payment to place order.

question: Can I exchange product?
answer: Yes, exchange is available within 7 days.

question: Product exchange
answer: You can exchange product from My Orders section.

question: Is my payment secure?
answer: Yes, all payments are secured with encryption.

question: Payment safety
answer: We use secure payment gateways to protect your data.

question: Do you have mobile app?
answer: Yes, our app is available on Android and iOS.

question: App download
answer: Download our app from Play Store or App Store.

question: How to check offers?
answer: Visit homepage to see latest offers and discounts.

question: Current discounts
answer: Check homepage for ongoing deals.

question: What if product is damaged?
answer: You can request return or replacement.

question: Received damaged product
answer: Report it and request replacement.

question: Can I change order after placing?
answer: Changes are allowed before the order is shipped.

question: Modify my order
answer: You can modify order before shipping.

question: Do you deliver internationally?
answer: Currently we deliver only within the country.

question: International shipping
answer: International delivery is not available.

question: How to apply coupon?
answer: Apply coupon code at checkout page.

question: Discount code not working
answer: Ensure the coupon is valid and not expired.

question: How to create account?
answer: Click on sign up and enter your details.

question: Register account
answer: Use sign up option to create new account.

question: Can I track multiple orders?
answer: Yes, all orders can be tracked in My Orders.

question: View my orders
answer: Go to My Orders to see all your orders.

question: What is COD?
answer: Cash on Delivery means you pay when the product is delivered.

question: Explain cash on delivery
answer: You can pay in cash at the time of delivery.

question: How to logout?
answer: Click logout button in your profile section.

question: Sign out
answer: Use logout option to exit your account.
